ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer leaving the review */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "word_counts" TEXT /* Word counts for each word in the review */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score of the review */,
  "sentiment_analysis" TEXT /* Detailed sentiment analysis results */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "image_urls" TEXT /* URLs of images uploaded with the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer (hashed) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the customer details */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer's email is verified */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
column_names: Quantity of the product in stock
Timestamp when the product was added to the database
Timestamp of the last update to the product details
ID of the product being reviewed
ID of the customer leaving the review
Word counts for each word in the review
Date when the review was posted
Number of users who found the review helpful
URLs of images uploaded with the review
Timestamp when the review was created
Timestamp of the last update to the review
Timestamp when the customer account was created
Timestamp of the last update to the customer details
